# Petroleum Geology of Deposits

**Summary**: The study of the geology of petroleum and other hydrocarbons.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2009-al-gathe-2|AL-GATHE, 2009]] applied petroleum-geology principles to evaluate carbonate reservoirs.

- [[2017-sadeed|SADEED, 2017]] Referenced in this thesis.

- [[2020-gbiyanju|Gbiyanju, 2020]] focused on petroleum-geology to evaluate Paleozoic tight sand reservoirs in Saudi Arabia.

## Scientific Context

- [[2009-al-gathe-2|AL-GATHE, 2009]] Focuses on carbonate reservoir properties.

- [[2017-sadeed|SADEED, 2017]] Referenced in this thesis.

- [[2020-gbiyanju|Gbiyanju, 2020]] focused on petroleum-geology to evaluate Paleozoic tight sand reservoirs in Saudi Arabia.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2009-al-gathe-2|AL-GATHE, 2009]] Analysis of core samples.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Petrophysical interpretation is essential for accurate water saturation in carbonate systems. ([[2009-al-gathe-2|AL-GATHE, 2009, p. 57]])


- Referenced in this thesis. ([[2017-sadeed|SADEED, 2017]])

- The integration of chemostratigraphy and geomechanics provides a robust framework for asset life cycle management. ([[2020-gbiyanju|Gbiyanju, 2020, p. 19]])
